query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "n!: i64"
               FROM proposals p
               JOIN current c ON c.workspace_id = p.workspace_id AND c.skill_id = p.skill_id
               WHERE p.workspace_id = $1 AND p.status = 'open'
                 AND c.epoch = p.base_epoch AND c.seq = p.base_seq
                 AND p.skill_id = ANY($2)
